ingredients_text: aromatic shredded duck (48%) ( duck, water, salt, rice wine, sugar, fennel, star anise, sichuan pepper, dried ginger, true cardamom, liquorice, clove, bay leaf, cinnamon, dried orange peel, ginger powder), pancakes (28%) (wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, nicotinamide, thiamine hydrochloride), water, rapeseed oil, potato starch, salt), hoisin sauce (24%) (sugar, water, fermented soya bean, rice vinegar, cornflour, mirin, salt, garlic puree, barley malt, soya bean, wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, nicotinamide, thiamine hydrochloride), fennel seed, cinnamon, aniseed).
